original_image_tags: A rectangular, black ink stamp is in the lower right corner. The stamp reads: "FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION / U.S. DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE / SEP 12 1947". Below the date, the fields "SAN FRANCISCO" (likely) and "FILE" are visible.

elements.description: A typed memorandum from Headquarters Fourth Air Force, dated 9 September 1947, with the subject 'Investigation of Flying Disc.' It includes a handwritten signature, a date stamp, and is marked 'CONFIDENTIAL' at the top and bottom.
